action.reasoning: Observation: DCRNN with hidden_dim=128 achieved mae_60min=3.5761 after 50 epochs. Loss plateaued. Analysis: Graph WaveNet typically achieves better results on METR-LA (~2.7 mae_60min). It uses dilated causal convolutions + graph convolutions + adaptive adjacency matrix. Decision: Implement GWNet architecture, train for 50 epochs initially.
